findings.description: Source states the widget is for business screens and explicitly excludes common header logos: "共通ヘッダ内のロゴは対象外". This is a usage constraint that helps developers decide when to use this widget.
findings.source_evidence: 業務画面内画面内に画像を表示する場合に使用する。(共通ヘッダ内のロゴは対象外)

findings.location: s3 — 内部構造・改修時の留意点 (templateコード例)
findings.description: The template CSS code example is omitted. The source provides the full CSS Media Query template with specific breakpoint values (640px / 639px) and vendor-specific DPI conditions (-webkit-min-device-pixel-ratio, -moz-min-device-pixel-ratio, min-resolution:120dpi). These concrete values are needed when extending or customizing breakpoints, which the source identifies as a key modification scenario.

PascalCase component names ResponsibleImageUnsupportRatio and ResponsibleImageUnsupportMatchMedia are listed in the 部品一覧 table in s3 but are absent from s3 hints. Developers searching for pixel-ratio-unsupported or match-media-unsupported browser handling would use these names.
findings.source_evidence: /js/ui/nablarch/ResponsibleImageUnsupportRatio.template — ピクセル比が判定できないブラウザ向けのテンプレート / /js/ui/nablarch/ResponsibleImageUnsupportMatchMedia.template — メディアクエリが効かない場合ブラウザ用テンプレート
